payload.commitMessage:
fix: Upgraded all PHP dependencies to latest stable versions: PHP 8.4...

- composer.json
- composer.lock
- app/Filament/Resources/GajiResource.php
- app/Filament/Resources/PegawaiResource.php
- app/Filament/Resources/PeriodeResource.php
- app/Filament/Resources/PotongResource.php
- app/Filament/Resources/TagihanResource.php
- app/Filament/Resources/TunkerResource.php

GSD context:
- Milestone: M001 - Dependency Modernization
- Slice: S01 - Full-Stack Dependency Upgrade
- Task: T01 - Upgraded all PHP dependencies to latest stable versions: PHP 8.4, Laravel 12.61.1, Filament 4.11.6, Pest 3.8.6, and fixed all Filament v4 breaking changes in Resources and RelationManagers.

GSD-Task: S01/T01
